doc_title_en: Notice regarding initiatives toward realizing capital-cost and share-price conscious management

key_facts.reason_jp: 企業価値の持続的向上、資本効率向上及び市場評価の改善

summary_en: ROE exceeding weighted average cost of capital and PBR target of 1.0 or above. Medium-term plan 'NOZAWA NEXT3' approved with specific capital efficiency and market valuation improvement initiatives. Execution framework effective from announcement date (May 15, 2026).
summary_jp: WACC超過ROE達成、PBR1.0以上を目標。資本効率向上と市場評価改善を含む中期経営計画「NOZAWA NEXT3」を策定・実行。2026年5月15日以降実施。
tag_en: COC Initial - ROE > WACC target + PBR ≥1.0 - FY3/29 onwards
tag_jp: 資本コスト意識経営 - ROE>WACC + PBR≥1.0 - FY3/29以降
